configurations.description: Configures the instrumentation to recognize an alternative set of HTTP request methods. All other methods will be treated as `_OTHER`.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.http.known-methods

configurations.description: List of HTTP request headers to capture in HTTP server telemetry.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.http.server.capture-request-headers

configurations.description: List of HTTP response headers to capture in HTTP server telemetry.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.http.server.capture-response-headers

configurations.description: Enable the capture of experimental HTTP server telemetry. Adds the `http.request.body.size` and `http.response.body.size` attributes to spans, and records `http.server.request.size` and `http.server.response.size` metrics.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.http.server.emit-experimental-telemetry

configurations.description: Enables capturing the experimental `servlet.timeout` span attribute.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.servlet.experimental-span-attributes

configurations.description: List of request parameter names to capture as span attributes.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.servlet.experimental.capture-request-parameters

description: This instrumentation enables HTTP server spans and metrics for IBM WebSphere Liberty application server.
name: liberty-20.0
